message:
Add core package unit tests

- Registry tests: prompts array, categories, getPrompt, getPromptsByCategory/Tag
- BM25 search tests: buildIndex, search ranking, field boosting
- Tokenize tests: tokenize, tokenizeRaw, ngrams, STOPWORDS
- Export tests: generateSkillMd, generateInstallScript, computeSkillHash

73 tests pass. Added test script to package.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
